name: Squash Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook squash in just a little bit of water until tender.
2. Drain and mash the squash.
3. Measure 2 cups of mashed squash and mix with remaining ingredients except cheese.
4. Pour mixture into a buttered 1 quart casserole dish and top with grated cheese.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
